name: Staff of Fire
reqAttune: by a druid, sorcerer, warlock, or wizard
entries: You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Fire damage while you hold this staff.

entries.name: Spells
entries: The staff has 10 charges. While holding the staff, you can cast one of the spells on the following table from it, using your spell save DC. The table indicates how many charges you must expend to cast the spell.

entries.name: Regaining Charges
entries: The staff regains {@dice 1d6 + 4} expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll {@dice 1d20}. On a 1, the staff crumbles into cinders and is destroyed.
